iti67:1.2: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti67:1.3: "There are these three forms of sagacity. Which three? Bodily sagacity, verbal sagacity, and mental sagacity. These are the three forms of sagacity."
iti67:1.4: A sage in body, a sage in speech, a sage in mind, fermentation-free: a sage consummate in sagacity is said to be bathed of evil.
iti67:1.5: This, too, was the meaning of what was said by the Blessed One, so I have heard.
